title: UFOs & JFK: He Knew Too Much! (Ft. Danny Sheehan)
summary: This interview explores the JFK assassination, connecting it to CIA covert operations, mafia involvement, and anti-Castro Cuban exiles. The discussion traces how an assassination team originally created to kill Fidel Castro was allegedly redirected to assassinate President Kennedy, with connections to drug trafficking operations, Howard Hughes, and various intelligence figures.

acronyms.definition: Large CIA operations base set up on University of Miami campus for covert operations against Cuba under Operation Mongoose
Code name for the CIA program training assassination teams

events.description: Fidel Castro and Che Guevara overthrow Batista in Cuba, causing exodus of Batista supporters to Florida
Nelson Rockefeller withdraws from Republican presidential primary on June 7th, triggering Nixon to contact Howard Hughes about assassination operations
John F. Kennedy elected president, defeating Richard Nixon
Bay of Pigs invasion fails in April; Kennedy refuses to provide air cover
Kennedy forces Allen Dulles into retirement from CIA in September-October
Cuban Missile Crisis occurs in October, bringing world close to nuclear war
Frank Sturgis and Cuban exiles sink a Russian ship in December, defying Kennedy's orders
Kennedy contacts CIA Director McCone on June 5th requesting full briefing on UFO information
JFK files released by National Archives - 80,000 pages of declassified documents

key_claims.claim: David Morales fired the shot from the knoll that killed JFK
The S-force assassination team was originally created to kill Castro but was redirected to kill Kennedy
Nixon contacted Howard Hughes to set up the assassination team while still Vice President, referring to himself as 'the president'
Santos Trafficante directly told researchers about how the assassination operation was set up
The Zapruder film was doctored in Rochester with frames removed or reversed to hide that Kennedy was shot from the front
Dick Billings personally described the doctoring of the Zapruder film
Priscilla McMillan was revealed to be a witting CIA asset in the released documents
George Joannides lied to Congress about running the psychological warfare program for JM Wave
James Angleton lied about knowing Ruben Efron who ran the mail intercept program spying on Oswald
CIA had a file on Lee Harvey Oswald since 1959 and was monitoring his mail for years
Heroin smuggling profits were used to fund covert operations supporting Chiang Kai-shek and the Kuomintang in China
Assassination team training took place at Clint Murchison Jr.'s ranch in Huaca, Mexico
Curtis LeMay put the US into DEFCON 2 and launched a U-2 over Russia during Cuban Missile Crisis without presidential permission
Kennedy and Khrushchev exchanged 18 secret letters through Norman Cousins discussing nuclear disarmament
Pope John XXIII was proposed to broker and verify Soviet-US nuclear disarmament
Kennedy proposed a joint Soviet-US space program to replace economic stimulus from nuclear weapons programs
Mary Pinchot Meyer and JFK did LSD together, provided by Timothy Leary
Kennedy ordered helicopter gunships to burn out Cuban exile paramilitary bases at No Name Key and the Everglades
